article.description: — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander had 30 points and nine assists in three quarters, and the Oklahoma City Thunder rolled past the Los Angeles Lakers 121-92 on Wednesday night.
article.headline: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 30 points as the Thunder beat Doncic and the Lakers 121-92

images.caption: Luka Doncic responds to Dallas Mavericks general manager Nico Harrison being fired by his old team.
images.name: Luka reacts to Mavs firing Nico Harrison: “I thought I would stay there forever”

keywords: Los Angeles Lakers @ Oklahoma City Thunder
article.linkText: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 30 points as the Thunder beat Doncic and the Lakers 121-92
article.story: OKLAHOMA CITY -- — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander had 30 points and nine assists in three quarters, and the Oklahoma City Thunder rolled past the Los Angeles Lakers 121-92 on Wednesday night. Isaiah Joe added 21 points for the Thunder, who improved their league-best record to 12-1. Oklahoma City blew out one of its top Western Conference rivals for the second game. It beat the Golden State Warriors 126-102 on Tuesday night. Los Angeles guard Luka Doncic was held to 19 points on 7-for-20 shooting. He was averaging 37.1 points coming into the game. Oklahoma City’s Lu Dort, a defensive stopper who normally guards Doncic, was out with an upper right trapezius strain, and the Thunder got the job done anyway. Austin Reaves, who was averaged 30.3 points, had 13 points on 4-for-12 shooting for the Lakers. Los Angeles had scored at least 116 points in every game this season, but it didn't get close after shooting 40.3% from the field. The Lakers played without LeBron James once again, though he practiced on Wednesday for the first time this season. He got some reps with the team’s G League affiliate earlier in the day in California. Los Angeles could have used another star against Oklahoma City. The Thunder led 30-18 at the end of the first quarter, then held the Lakers without a field goal for nearly eight minutes to start the second. Los Angeles missed its first 11 shots of the quarter as Oklahoma City extended its advantage to 70-38 at halftime. In the closing seconds of the third quarter, Gilgeous-Alexander drove to the hoop, then fired a behind-the-back pass to Joe, who nailed a 3-pointer as time expired in the period to give Oklahoma City a 100-64 lead. Up next Lakers: Visit the New Orleans Pelicans on Friday. Thunder: Visit the Charlotte Hornets on Saturday. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/hub/NBA

videos.description: Los Angeles Lakers vs. Oklahoma City Thunder: Game Highlights
videos.headline: Los Angeles Lakers vs. Oklahoma City Thunder: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Los Angeles Lakers vs. Oklahoma City Thunder: Game Highlights) 2025/11/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander somehow floats it in over Deandre Ayton for the Thunder vs. the Lakers.
videos.headline: SGA gets tough floater to fall for Thunder

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (SGA gets tough floater to fall for Thunder) 2025/11/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Luka Doncic dimes Deandre Ayton who gets the and-1 bucket to fall for the Lakers vs. the Thunder.
videos.headline: Deandre Ayton lays in and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Deandre Ayton lays in and-1) 2025/11/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Ajay Mitchell sinks a midrange jumper for the Thunder vs. the Lakers.
videos.headline: Ajay Mitchell hits the jumper for Thunder

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Ajay Mitchell hits the jumper for Thunder) 2025/11/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander finds Chet Holmgren who splashes the trey for the Thunder vs. the Lakers.
videos.headline: Chet Homgren drills a 3 for Thunder

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Chet Homgren drills a 3 for Thunder) 2025/11/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander takes advantage of the defense to find an open Alex Caruso who hits the three for the Thunder vs. the Lakers.
videos.headline: Alex Caruso hits a trey for Thunder

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Alex Caruso hits a trey for Thunder) 2025/11/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander dials up a three for the Thunder vs. the Lakers.
videos.headline: SGA cashes a 3 for the Thunder

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (SGA cashes a 3 for the Thunder) 2025/11/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Ajay Mitchell knocks down a three as he's fouled for a four-point Thunder play vs. the Lakers.
videos.headline: Ajay Mitchell hits and-1 triple for Thunder

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Ajay Mitchell hits and-1 triple for Thunder) 2025/11/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Isaiah Hartenstein elevates for the two-handed Thunder jam vs. the Lakers.
videos.headline: Isaiah Hartenstein throws it down for Thunder

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Isaiah Hartenstein throws it down for Thunder) 2025/11/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Ajay Mitchell tosses it up to Isaiah Hartenstein to throw back down for a Thunder alley-oop vs. the Lakers.
videos.headline: Isaiah Hartenstein slams down Thunder alley-oop

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Isaiah Hartenstein slams down Thunder alley-oop) 2025/11/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Alex Caruso wins the ball back, then splashes a three on the other end for the Thunder vs. the Lakers.
videos.headline: Caruso makes the steal and hits a 3 for Thunder

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Caruso makes the steal and hits a 3 for Thunder) 2025/11/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Chet Holmgren powers to the paint then hits a nice jump shot for the Thunder vs. the Lakers.
videos.headline: Chet hits nice jumper for Thunder

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Chet hits nice jumper for Thunder) 2025/11/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander finds Isaiah Hartenstein for a Thunder jam vs. the Lakers.
videos.headline: SGA feeds Hartenstein for Thunder slam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (SGA feeds Hartenstein for Thunder slam) 2025/11/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Cason Wallace gets up to throw the hammer down for the Thunder vs. the Lakers.
videos.headline: Cason Wallace throws down monster jam for Thunder

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Cason Wallace throws down monster jam for Thunder) 2025/11/13 ESHEET
